'''vaduthu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sabbatarian|sabbatarian]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-d-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sabbatarian|sabbatarian]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| vaduthu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vædithith|vædithith]] || [[word:vædithij|vædithij]] || [[word:vædithish|vædithish]] || [[word:vædithi|vædithi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vaduduthuth|vaduduthuth]] || [[word:vaduduthuj|vaduduthuj]] || [[word:vaduduthush|vaduduthush]] || [[word:vaduduthu|vaduduthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vaduthuth|vaduthuth]] || [[word:vaduthuj|vaduthuj]] || [[word:vaduthush|vaduthush]] || [[word:vaduthu|vaduthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vadufthuth|vadufthuth]] || [[word:vadufthuj|vadufthuj]] || [[word:vadufthush|vadufthush]] || [[word:vadufthuf|vadufthuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vaduthuthu|vaduthuthu]] || [[word:vaduthuju|vaduthuju]] || [[word:vaduthushu|vaduthushu]] || [[word:vaduthuku|vaduthuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vaduthuth|vaduthuth]] || [[word:vaduthuj|vaduthuj]] || [[word:vaduthush|vaduthush]] || [[word:vaduthu|vaduthu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vaduthuthul|vaduthuthul]] || [[word:vaduthujul|vaduthujul]] || [[word:vaduthushul|vaduthushul]] || [[word:vaduthukul|vaduthukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vaduthuthuthu|vaduthuthuthu]] || [[word:vaduthujuju|vaduthujuju]] || [[word:vaduthushushu|vaduthushushu]] || [[word:vaduthuku|vaduthuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vaduthuthun|vaduthuthun]] || [[word:vaduthujun|vaduthujun]] || [[word:vaduthushun|vaduthushun]] || [[word:vaduthukun|vaduthukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vaduthuthuoro|vaduthuthuoro]] || [[word:vaduthujuoro|vaduthujuoro]] || [[word:vaduthushuoro|vaduthushuoro]] || [[word:vaduthukuoro|vaduthukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
